name: excercise-app
description: A static strength-training planner for full gym environments. The app generates workouts based on:

scripts.build:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html styles.css app.js exercises.js manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js icon-192.png icon-512.png apple-touch-icon.png www/
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:web && npx cap copy
scripts.android:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios:open: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
